calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jul-26-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Pollak for Maritza Frankfurt.

Mr. Pollak stated that the property was on Montgomery Street, that the Trustee travels to San Francisco three times a week to administer the Trust, that all of the papers are at the house, that the Trustee chooses to have the mail go to Palo Alto and that the Trustee works out of the house. In addition, he stated that the property was going to be sold some day and that they were trying to wrap everything up. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets was dismissed without prejudice. Mr. Pollak can re-file the petition in Santa Clara County.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jul-12-2010 Continued To Jul-26-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
